name: LCNB CORP
summary: LCNB Corp. is an Ohio-based financial holding company headquartered in Lebanon, Ohio, operating primarily through its wholly-owned subsidiary LCNB National Bank. The Bank offers commercial and industrial loans, real estate loans, agricultural loans, consumer loans, SBA loans, wealth management and trust services, fiduciary services, investment management, security brokerage services through LPL Financial, and various deposit and electronic banking services across Southwestern and South Central Ohio and Northern Kentucky.
